title: phase 1: 6 new models, open 5 to free, midijourney to azure, deepseek to fireworks, cheaper embeddings
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
**Phase 1 of the May 2026 model refresh** — non-disruptive only. Phase 2 (paid-only flips, markup increases on top-tier models) ships separately on Tuesday, June 2.

## ➕ Six new models

| Model | Provider | Verified upstream | Price (1.5× markup) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `grok-4.3` | azure (eastus, capacity 5000) | HTTP 200 | $1.25 / $2.50 per 1M (Global; long-context surcharge absorbed) |
| `gemini-search-fast` | google (3.1 Flash Lite + grounding) | reuses portkey config | $0.375 / $2.25 per 1M |
| `gemini-search-large` | google (3.5 Flash + grounding) | reuses portkey config | $2.25 / $13.50 per 1M |
| `wan-pro` | alibaba (wan2.7-i2v / wan2.7-t2v) | DashScope task accepted | $0.15/s (720p), $0.225/s (1080p) — audio bundled |
| `cohere-embed-v4` | azure (eastus, capacity 100) | HTTP 200, 1536-dim vector | $0.18 / 1M |
| `qwen3-embedding-8b` | fireworks serverless | HTTP 200, 4096-dim vector | $0.15 / 1M |

The two Gemini search variants ride the new Gemini 3 grounding tier: **$14 / 1K queries (vs $35 on 2.x)** + 5K free queries/month shared across the Gemini 3 family.

## 🔓 Opening to free Pollen

Free-tier users gain access (paid users unaffected, no price change for individuals):
- `gpt-5.5` (premium flagship reasoning)
- `deepseek-pro` (DeepSeek V4 Pro)
- `grok-large` (Grok 4.20 Reasoning)
- `nova-canvas` (image gen + editing + inpainting)
- `universal-3-pro` (AssemblyAI high-accuracy STT)

## 🔄 Upgrades & consolidations

- **MIDIjourney** (`midijourney`): bedrock Claude Haiku 4.5 ($1.10/$5.50) → Azure GPT-5.4 Mini ($0.75/$4.50). Cheaper base; persona prompt unchanged.
- **MIDIjourney Large** (`midijourney-large`): bedrock Claude Opus 4.6 ($5.50/$27.50, paid) → Azure GPT-5.5 ($5.00/$30.00, **free**). Also opens to free Pollen.
- **DeepSeek V4 Flash** (`deepseek`): openrouter ($0.126/$0.252) → fireworks ($0.14/$0.28). Consolidates with V4 Pro already on Fireworks. Orphan openrouter config removed.

## ⬇️ Cheaper embeddings

Markup 1.5× → 1×:
- `openai-3-small`: $0

gist.headline: Six new brains for the hive
gist.blurb: We just dropped six new models into the API, including Grok 4.3 and Wan Pro video generation. Even better, we've unlocked five heavyweight models like GPT-5.5 and DeepSeek V4 Pro for the free tier.
gist.summary: Added six new models including grok-4.3, wan-pro, and gemini-search variants, while opening five premium models like gpt-5.5, deepseek-pro, and grok-large to the free tier.
gist.impact: Free tier users can now access flagship reasoning models like GPT-5.5 and Grok Large, while all users get access to new Gemini 3 search and Wan Pro video generation.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a generous host, handing out glowing orbs (representing the new models) to the Monitor Robot and Nomnom creature in a lush digital garden, symbolizing expanded access and new capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny crown, handing glowing lime green (#ecf874) data orbs to a chunky monitor-head robot and a round tan nomnom creature in a lush digital garden. Soft pastel gradient background of lavender and peach. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites, emotionally warm.
